title: DO NOT MERGE: investigate healthcheck in CI
body:
DO NOT MERGE. This is an instrumented copy of #3313, a PR
which passed in CI even though that should've been impossible.
I am trying to understand why.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>

The issue is now, I believe, understood: https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/3360#issuecomment-503247376
